body:
Bumped into lefcourt today at jamie gertlers engagement - told him about I correct - he loved the idea and has clients whom he sd would use it...it up as of today - I'll set you up w/ a password etc tom
Saw mort too - he also loved the idea..let's see how it goes.. 
Thanks
